hero_title: The best care for your health and smile
hero_subtitle: Dr Ilhom Dental Clinic offers top-tier stomatological services using cutting-edge technologies and internationally certified experts. Your gorgeous smile is our top achievement.
about_subtitle: A perfect blend of advanced digital dentistry and patient care
about_text: At our clinic, individual care and premium service are absolute priorities. We work exclusively with international certified dental equipment and state of the art bio-materials.
about_point_2: Highly trained clinical team with international training
about_point_3: 100% painless treatment under strict sterilisation (anti-HIV, anti-Hepatitis)
about_point_4: Comfortable minimalist design, special approach for kids
services_subtitle: Advanced treatments designed to perfect your dental aesthetics and wellness
service_implants_desc: Restore missing teeth from the root with durable, state-of-the-art implants.
service_ortho_desc: Align your bite and teeth beautifully with invisible or metallic orthodontic systems.
service_cosmetic_desc: Complete aesthetic smile designs and elite composite restructurings.
service_veneers_desc: Ultra-thin, premium porcelain veneers for a flawless, bright Hollywood smile.
service_whitening_desc: Advanced dental whitening tech, completely pain-free and up to 8 tones lighter.
service_pediatric_desc: Caring, playful, and stress-free dental care tailored specifically for children.
service_surgery_desc: Gentle extraction and minimal invasive surgical procedures under top anaesthesia.
service_root_desc: Microscopic root canal treatment for complete precision and tooth preservation.
service_prostho_desc: Zirconia crowns and high-end aesthetic dental prosthetics of any complexity.
service_periodon_desc: Laser treatment of gums and expert clinical care for periodontal health.
doctors_subtitle: Your dental health is in the hands of board-certified clinical masters
gallery_subtitle: A sneak peek into our luxury environment, equipment and treatments
reviews_subtitle: Honest feedback from individuals we had the honour of treating
booking_subtitle: Choose a convenient date and clinical service for your visit
booking_comments_ph: Tell us about your dental pain, veneers wish or consultation...
booking_success: Your appointment request has been successfully submitted! We will contact you soon.
contact_subtitle: Visit our luxury workspace. We are open and waiting for you

contact_hours_sub: Available on Saturdays and Sundays for your convenience
live_chat_welcome: Hello! Welcome to Dr. Ilhom Dental Clinic support. Write your message and our team will reply shortly.
footer_text: Sharing a healthy and confident smile with you is our highest clinical milestone. We restore, elevate, and protect your dental wellness.
